title: fix(ltx2): route through HTTPS tunnel; retry /result on 202
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: The video pipeline is flowing again
gist.blurb: We've patched up a routing issue that was causing LTX-2 video generations to fail. Your prompts will now reliably turn into moving pixels once again!
gist.summary: Fixed a Cloudflare routing issue and added retry logic to restore functionality for LTX-2 video generation.
gist.impact: Users can once again generate videos using the LTX-2 model without encountering 403 or 202 errors.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot fixing a glowing green pipe or tunnel that has film strips/video frames flowing through it. The Nomnom creature could be happily eating the old 403 error logs.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, using a wrench to fix a glowing lime green (#ecf874) pipe. A strip of video film flows smoothly out of the pipe. Nearby, the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of papers labeled '403 ERROR'. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
